source: CFPB HMDA loan-level FHA 2023-2025, all lenders

market_share_inertia.finding: Low-denial lenders did NOT gain market share 2023-2025. Market does not reward lender performance with volume. (full-market replication of zero flow elasticity)

fixed_profile_spread.profile: DTI 36-42, CLTV 80-89, FHA, 2025, lenders with >=200 such apps
fixed_profile_spread.finding: Same healthy profile faces denial rates from 0% to 100% depending solely on lender choice
